common.projects_subtitle: Professional and personal projects I've worked on.
common.labs_subtitle: Experiments, prototypes, and proof of concepts.
common.blog_subtitle: Thoughts and learnings on web development.

labs_showroom.title: 3D Dealer Showroom
labs_showroom.featured_summary: Finished 3D immersive showroom: Three.js scene with HDR and PMREM, real-time color, trim and wheel configurator with GLB geometry swap, and scroll-driven orbital camera with per-device adaptive input profiling.
labs_showroom.summary: Initial experiment scaffold with poster, immersive shell, local manifest, and a client-ready mount zone for the 3D runtime.
labs_showroom.poster_alt: Concept poster for the immersive showroom
labs_showroom.status_value: Base narrative and reactive scaffold are now live
labs_showroom.hint_value: Replace the scaffold with the first real GLB asset and wire mutable materials
labs_showroom.canvas_title: Prepared mount zone for the 3D runtime
labs_showroom.canvas_summary: The actual scene will be mounted here in the next phase. For now this validates the shell, the route, the visual flow, and the lab manifest setup.

story.jump_description: Use these jumps to review the walkthrough without relying only on scroll.
story.canvas_reactive_copy: The scaffold reacts to scroll progress with camera, rotation, and color changes to simulate the future showroom narrative.
story.presentation_title: The default configuration sets the tone before choices open up
story.presentation_description: The opening view presents the vehicle in its natural balance so stance, proportion, and confidence sell first, before product detail takes over.
story.package_title: The package decides how premium the vehicle reads
story.package_description: The first useful zoom should answer what kind of premium presence the unit projects: more technical, more understated, or more expressive depending on the trim package.
story.color_title: Exterior color changes the commercial read instantly
story.color_description: At this distance the bodywork reads like a finished proposal: the tone should help decide whether the unit asks for quiet elegance or a more assertive presence.
story.satin_title: The satin read refines texture without breaking the silhouette
story.satin_description: This virtual step gives the finish its own moment under the light so the eye can judge texture and surface quality without opening a redundant panel.
story.treatment_title: The paint treatment defines long-term finish quality and durability
story.treatment_description: Paint protection decides how the bodywork will respond to light and environment over time: from standard paint to high-gloss ceramic coating.
story.wheels_title: The right wheel setup closes stance, grip, and character
story.wheels_description: The final close-up is reserved for the lower stance of the car: wheels and tires decide whether the unit feels more athletic, more technical, or more refined.
story.intro_title: The first impression sells before the spec sheet appears
story.intro_description: The opening does not launch a configurator. It sells presence, proportion, and character so the vehicle feels desirable before details and options enter the conversation.
story.approach_title: Every meter pulls the decision closer to the car
story.approach_description: The walkthrough cuts distance, removes noise, and concentrates attention on the bodywork so the scene behaves like a sales approach rather than a simple camera move.
story.focus_title: The vehicle owns the scene and earns the attention
story.focus_description: At this point the composition no longer presents an environment. It presents a proposition. The car takes center stage, becomes legible, and sets up the moment to choose trim, wheels, and finish.
story.config_description: This stage opens the choice of {label} as if a real unit were being closed: every change appears immediately so presence, character, and commercial fit can be compared on the spot.

overlay.enter_hint: The scene breathes first. Then the wheel moves the camera in and out while the mouse orbits around the vehicle to open each decision like a real sales conversation.
overlay.scroll_hint: Use the wheel to zoom and the mouse to orbit the camera around the vehicle.
overlay.config_pending_copy: The scene is still building desire. As soon as the car enters product mode you can choose paint, wheels, and trim the way a real sales conversation would unfold.
overlay.presets_hidden_copy: Recommended combinations appear only once the vehicle fully owns the scene, so the sales story never fights with the staging.
overlay.editorial_sales_copy: The scene does not try to sell specifications too early. It sells presence, confidence, and desire first; the unit selection comes after that.
overlay.offer_copy: {vehicle} is introduced as a piece ready for conversation: first visual impact, then product focus, and finally personalization.
overlay.sales_narrative_discovery: The scene is still selling presence and proportion before asking for a concrete decision.
overlay.sales_narrative_focus: Now the car can already defend itself as a product: the eye understands volume, character, and positioning.
overlay.sales_narrative_config: The story is now in closing mode: each adjustment helps decide which vehicle makes the strongest case to present or reserve.

configurator.section_description: Every choice changes the car immediately so the experience feels closer to a premium sales handoff than to a technical control panel.
configurator.section_description_color: Choose the tone that frames this unit best for the client: more restrained, warmer, or brighter depending on the impression you want to close.
configurator.active_hint_color: Choose the tone that sells the body best
configurator.active_hint_trim: Defines the final character of the unit
configurator.option_meta_color: Sets the first impression and the tone of the bodywork.
configurator.option_meta_color_graphite: Restrained and technical for a more executive, controlled presence.
configurator.option_meta_color_sand_pearl: Warm and elegant for a calmer, more premium read.
configurator.option_meta_color_ember_copper: More expressive and emotional for a bolder first impression.
configurator.option_meta_color_ice_silver: Bright and precise for a cleaner, more contemporary presence.
configurator.option_meta_wheels: Adjusts side presence and the stance of the vehicle.
configurator.option_meta_trim: Defines the detailing level and the final character of the unit.

presets.section_description: Curated shortcuts to present three buying directions with a clear personality.
presets.atelier_graphite_description: A restrained, technical read with Graphite, Satin, and Sport Spyder 19.
presets.night_runner_description: A sharper profile with Ice Silver, Shadow, and Multi-Spoke 20.
presets.launch_edition_description: Main demo combination with Ember Copper, Shadow, and RS Forged 21.

persistence.auto_saved: This combination is saved in this browser so the conversation can resume without starting over.
persistence.restored: The latest saved combination has been restored so the review can continue.

runtime.no_webgl_copy: This device or browser cannot mount the 3D runtime. The lab still keeps a stable presentation while a degraded visual path is prepared.
runtime.reduced_motion_copy: The GLB switches to a static mode to respect reduced-motion preferences while preserving the lab narrative and configurator feedback.
runtime.quality_balanced_copy: The GLB trims visual cost to keep the lab feeling fluid without losing the walkthrough rhythm or configurator feedback.
runtime.quality_efficient_copy: The GLB switches to an efficient profile with lower detail, lower DPR, and fewer auxiliary layers to protect fluidity on tighter devices.

summary_panel.title: {vehicle} configured for review
summary_panel.description: The current proposal presents the {vehicle} in {color} paint, {trim} trim, and {wheels} wheels, a combination ready to be evaluated as if it were already on display.
summary_panel.footnote: Ready for internal demo review. Last local save: {savedAt}.

dock.stage_label_intro: The vehicle is introduced before any choices appear
dock.stage_label_approach: The scene is preparing the decision moment
dock.stage_label_focus: The car now sells itself through composition
dock.stage_label_config: Time to close the strongest combination
dock.hero_preview_copy: You are still in the desire-building phase: the car is being presented before full configuration opens up.
dock.hero_ready_copy: Right now the proposal pairs {color}, {trim} trim, and {wheels} wheels to create a clear, desirable read of the vehicle.
dock.curated_direction_copy: The current curated direction is {preset}, useful when you need to show a buying personality without losing time to micro-adjustments.
dock.curated_direction_pending: As soon as the vehicle reaches full commercial focus, curated combinations will appear to guide the conversation.
dock.hero_spotlight_copy: A quick read to present intent, presence, and finish before going deeper into the spec.
dock.story_copy: Scroll is not just navigation here: it works like a sales approach, moving from impact, to focus, to personalization.

labs_showroom.challenge_1: Wheel geometry swap with world-space bounding box scaling and face alignment
labs_showroom.challenge_2: Tyre mesh isolation after material replacement via an identity reference Set
labs_showroom.challenge_3: Adaptive input profiling with per-device lerp curves, damping, and scroll multipliers

hero.summary: I love IT and technology. I spend most of my free time researching new ways and means of doing things. I love to innovate. I consider myself a very creative, cheerful person with a great attitude. I strive to work on projects that improve people's lives. I love group dynamics and teamwork.
